content.query:
--DROP VIEW Budget2023
CREATE VIEW Budget2023 AS 
SELECT 
    Prop_0 AS [Customer],
    Prop_1 AS [Division],
    Prop_2 AS [Brand],
    BudgetDescription,
    BudgetYear,
    BudgetPeriod,
    BudgetYYYYPP AS BudgetYYYYPP,
    ISNULL(Value, 0) AS Value
FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/Budget/ForecastRAW.parquet',
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
) AS [result]
CROSS APPLY (
    VALUES
        ('Budget 2023', '2023',  '1', '2023-01', TRY_CONVERT(float,  PROP_3)),   -- 1
        ('Budget 2023', '2023',  '2', '2023-02', TRY_CONVERT(float,  PROP_4)),   -- 2
        ('Budget 2023', '2023',  '3', '2023-03', TRY_CONVERT(float,  PROP_5)),   -- 3
        ('Budget 2023', '2023',  '4', '2023-04', TRY_CONVERT(float,  PROP_6)),   -- 4
        ('Budget 2023', '2023',  '5', '2023-05', TRY_CONVERT(float,  PROP_7)),   -- 5
        ('Budget 2023', '2023',  '6', '2023-06', TRY_CONVERT(float,  PROP_8)),   -- 6
        ('Budget 2023', '2023',  '7', '2023-07', TRY_CONVERT(float,  PROP_9)),   -- 7
        ('Budget 2023', '2023',  '8', '2023-08', TRY_CONVERT(float, PROP_10)),  -- 8
        ('Budget 2023', '2023',  '9', '2023-09', TRY_CONVERT(float, PROP_11)),  -- 9
        ('Budget 2023', '2023', '10', '2023-10', TRY_CONVERT(float, PROP_12)), -- 10
        ('Budget 2023', '2023', '11', '2023-11', TRY_CONVERT(float, PROP_13)), -- 11
        ('Budget 2023', '2023', '12', '2023-12', TRY_CONVERT(float, PROP_14)), -- 12
        
        ('Budget 2022', '2022',  '1', '2022-01', TRY_CONVERT(float, PROP_17)),  -- 1
        ('Budget 2022', '2022',  '2', '2022-02', TRY_CONVERT(float, PROP_18)),  -- 2
        ('Budget 2022', '2022',  '3', '2022-03', TRY_CONVERT(float, PROP_19)),  -- 3
        ('Budget 2022', '2022',  '4', '2022-04', TRY_CONVERT(float, PROP_20)),  -- 4
        ('Budget 2022', '2022',  '5', '2022-05', TRY_CONVERT(float, PROP_21)),  -- 5
        ('Budget 2022', '2022',  '6', '2022-06', TRY_CONVERT(float, PROP_22)),  -- 6
        ('Budget 2022', '2022',  '7', '2022-07', TRY_CONVERT(float, PROP_23)),  -- 7
        ('Budget 2022', '2022',  '8', '2022-08', TRY_CONVERT(float, PROP_24)),  -- 8
        ('Budget 2022', '2022',  '9', '2022-09', TRY_CONVERT(float, PROP_25)),  -- 9
        ('Budget 2022', '2022', '10', '2022-10', TRY_CONVERT(float, PROP_26)), -- 10
        ('Budget 2022', '2022', '11', '2022-11', TRY_CONVERT(float, PROP_27)), -- 11
        ('Budget 2022', '2022', '12', '2022-12', TRY_CONVERT(float, PROP_28)), -- 12
        
        ('Re-Forecast 2023', '2023',  '1', '2023-01', TRY_CONVERT(float, PROP_30)),  -- 1
        ('Re-Forecast 2023', '2023',  '2', '2023-02', TRY_CONVERT(float, PROP_31)),  -- 2
        ('Re-Forecast 2023', '2023',  '3', '2023-03', TRY_CONVERT(float, PROP_32)),  -- 3
        ('Re-Forecast 2023', '2023',  '4', '2023-04', TRY_CONVERT(float, PROP_33)),  -- 4
        ('Re-Forecast 2023', '2023',  '5', '2023-05', TRY_CONVERT(float, PROP_34)),  -- 5
        ('Re-Forecast 2023', '2023',  '6', '2023-06', TRY_CONVERT(float, PROP_35)),  -- 6
        ('Re-Forecast 2023', '2023',  '7', '2023-07', TRY_CONVERT(float, PROP_36)),  -- 7
        ('Re-Forecast 2023', '2023',  '8', '2023-08', TRY_CONVERT(float, PROP_37)),  -- 8
        ('Re-Forecast 2023', '2023',  '9', '2023-09', TRY_CONVERT(float, PROP_38)),  -- 9
        ('Re-Forecast 2023', '2023', '10', '2023-10', TRY_CONVERT(float, PROP_39)), -- 10
        ('Re-Forecast 2023', '2023', '11', '2023-11', TRY_CONVERT(float, PROP_40)), -- 11
        ('Re-Forecast 2023', '2023', '12', '2023-12', TRY_CONVERT(float, PROP_41))  -- 12
) AS unpivoted(BudgetDescription, BudgetYear, BudgetPeriod, BudgetYYYYPP, Value);
